query: SELECT eventType, status, COUNT(*) as cnt, MAX(createdAt) as lastReceived FROM webhook_events GROUP BY eventType, status ORDER BY lastReceived DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT eventType, status, COUNT(*) as cnt, MAX(createdAt) as lastReceived FROM webhook_events GROUP BY eventType, status ORDER BY lastReceived DESC LIMIT 20;
